/CAL:TO SET, TRAILING #21010610 AND BENCH WARRANT STAY/BWLIFT:05-13-22/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:1,000/BWNUM:5TH/X: 2ND OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/

/CAL:TO SET, TRAILING #21010610/CONT/DOPC/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:  NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANTIS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 05-20-22/X: BAIL SET AT $1,000/

/CAL: TRAILING 21010610/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BYTHE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL: PTD PROGRESS REPORT/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO07-01-21/X:BAIL SET AT $5,000/CONTD:5K BW STAY FTA PTD PROGRESS REPORT/DOPC/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL/X:DEFENDANT ON 2 HOUR STANDBY/X:BOTH PARTIES ARE READY/X:THERE ARE NO TRIAL DEPARTMENTS AVAILABLE AT THIS TIME/CAUSE1/X:GOOD CAUSEIS FOUND TO CONTINUE BEYOND THE LAST DAY OF 04-15-21/X:ORDER OF THE COURTFILED TODAY/LDTR:04-15-21 (GC COVID19)/CONT/SB:2HR/
